channel.title: GlobalSentry Epidemic Threat Feed
channel.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: WHO confirms cholera outbreak in Mozambique's Zambezia province — 2,400 cases in 3 weeks
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Cholera death toll in Haiti surpasses 180 as clean water access remains critically limited
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: South Sudan declares cholera emergency in Upper Nile state following severe flooding
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Cholera cases spike 340% in Malawi; WHO deploys emergency oral vaccine stockpile
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Bangladesh reports cholera surge in Cox's Bazar refugee camps — 1,100 cases since March
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Brazil records worst dengue season in a decade — 4.2 million suspected cases in 2026
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Dengue hemorrhagic fever kills 47 in Philippines as El Niño shifts mosquito habitats
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: India's Karnataka state reports 8,500 dengue cases amid unseasonal monsoon rains
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Peru declares health emergency in Lima as dengue cases overwhelm hospital capacity
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Thailand reports drug-resistant dengue strain circulating in Chiang Mai province
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Novel H5N1 avian influenza cluster detected in Egyptian poultry workers — 6 confirmed human cases
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: CDC investigating unusual pneumonia cluster in Minnesota — 23 cases, pathogen unidentified
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: WHO monitoring H7N9 resurgence in Guangdong province — 3 fatal cases in healthcare workers
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: MERS-CoV cases reported in Saudi Arabia ahead of Hajj pilgrimage season
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Tuberculosis outbreak in South African gold mines — multi-drug resistant strain confirmed
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: DRC reports new Ebola cluster in North Kivu — 14 confirmed cases near conflict zone
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Marburg virus case confirmed in Tanzania near Kagera border — contact tracing underway
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Guinea confirms Lassa fever cases in Nzérékoré — cross-border surveillance activated
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Crimean-Congo hemorrhagic fever cases rise 200% in Turkey's eastern provinces
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Uganda's Ebola containment under strain as 3 new cases emerge outside quarantine zone
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Measles outbreak in Pakistan's Punjab province — 12,000 cases; vaccination coverage at 58%
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Polio detected in London wastewater for first time since 2022 — booster campaign launched
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Afghanistan reports 28 new wild poliovirus cases as immunization campaign faces security threats
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Measles kills 140 children in Samoa amid vaccination hesitancy crisis
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Nigeria's Kano state sees measles surge — MSF sets up emergency treatment centers
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: WHO warns of pan-resistant Klebsiella pneumoniae spreading in Southeast Asian ICUs
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Candida auris outbreak in 4 US hospitals; CDC classifies as urgent antimicrobial threat
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Nipah virus seropositive bats detected near Dhaka — Bangladesh heightens surveillance
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Mpox clade Ib spreading in eastern DRC with sustained human-to-human transmission
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Unidentified febrile illness kills 9 in rural Bolivia — samples sent to CDC Atlanta
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Typhoid fever outbreak in Karachi linked to contaminated water supply — 3,200 cases
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Hepatitis E surge in South Sudan IDP camps — UNICEF calls for emergency sanitation funding
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Cryptosporidiosis cases triple in UK following record summer rainfall and flooding
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Acute watery diarrhea kills 56 children in Somalia's Bay region — MSF responds
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Leptospirosis spike in Kerala after severe flooding — 420 confirmed cases this month
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Yellow fever vaccine stockpile critically low as outbreaks hit 8 African nations simultaneously
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: India's BCG vaccine shortage impacts newborn immunization across 12 states
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Cold chain failure in Madagascar destroys 500,000 doses of pentavalent vaccine
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: WHO prequalifies new oral cholera vaccine but manufacturing capacity remains bottleneck
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Routine childhood immunization coverage drops to 78% globally — lowest since 2008
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Anthrax outbreak among Siberian reindeer herders linked to thawing permafrost
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Rift Valley fever confirmed in Kenya's Garissa county — livestock trade suspended
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Rabies deaths surge in India's Uttar Pradesh despite free vaccination policy
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Plague cases reported in Madagascar's central highlands ahead of rainy season
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: Brucellosis cluster in China's Inner Mongolia linked to illegal livestock trade
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: ProMED alert: Unexplained neurological syndrome in Vietnamese children — 18 cases under investigation
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: ECDC raises risk assessment for West Nile virus in southern Europe to HIGH
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: HealthMap detects anomalous respiratory illness tweets clustering in Jakarta
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: GOARN deploys rapid response team to investigate mystery fever in rural Peru
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.

item.title: WHO Disease Outbreak News: Diphtheria cases surging in Venezuela amid healthcare collapse
item.description: Real-time updates on global epidemic threats and health emergencies.
